evals.prompt: Here is the data from our recent marketing campaign: Spent $5000 on FB ads, got 100,000 impressions, 2000 clicks, and 50 conversions. On Google ads, spent $3000, got 50,000 impressions, 1500 clicks, and 80 conversions. Please generate a report summarizing this.
evals.expected_output: A markdown report containing an executive summary, key findings (e.g., comparing cost per conversion between FB and Google), detailed analysis, and recommendations.
